name: Push-Up
instructions: Place your hands slightly wider than shoulder-width on the floor.
Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest to just above the floor by bending your elbows.
Press back up to the starting position.

name: Close Grip Push-Up
instructions: Place your hands directly below your shoulders or slightly narrower.
Keep your elbows close to your body throughout the movement.
Lower your chest toward the floor under control.
Press back up to full arm extension.

name: Wide-Grip Pull-Up
instructions: Grip the bar wider than shoulder-width with an overhand grip.
Hang at full arm extension with your core engaged.
Pull your chest toward the bar by driving your elbows down and back.
Lower yourself under control back to the dead hang.

name: Close-Grip Pull-Up
instructions: Grip the bar with hands shoulder-width or slightly closer, palms facing away.
Hang at full arm extension.
Pull your chin above the bar by driving your elbows toward your hips.
Lower yourself under control back to the dead hang.

name: Triceps Dip
instructions: Grip the dip bars with arms fully extended and shoulders above your hands.
Keep your torso upright and lean slightly forward.
Lower yourself by bending your elbows until your upper arms are parallel to the floor.
Press back up to the starting position.

name: Hanging Knee Raise
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with an overhand grip, arms fully extended.
Engage your core and avoid swinging.
Raise your knees toward your chest by flexing your hips and abs.
Lower your legs back to the starting position under control.

name: Kettlebell Swing
instructions: Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, kettlebell on the floor in front of you.
Hinge at the hips and grip the kettlebell with both hands.
Hike the kettlebell back between your legs, then drive your hips forward explosively.
Let the kettlebell float to chest height, then hinge back and repeat.

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Hold the kettlebell by the horns at chest height.
Stand with feet slightly wider than shoulder-width, toes turned out.
Squat down keeping your chest tall and elbows inside your knees.
Drive through your heels to return to standing.

name: Kettlebell Military Press
instructions: Clean the kettlebell to the rack position at shoulder height.
Brace your core and glutes.
Press the kettlebell straight overhead to full arm extension.
Lower it back to the rack position under control.

name: Kettlebell Row
instructions: Hinge forward at the hips with a flat back, kettlebell hanging below your chest.
Row the kettlebell toward your hip by driving your elbow back.
Squeeze your shoulder blade at the top of the movement.
Lower under control and repeat.

name: Kettlebell Clean and Press
instructions: Start with the kettlebell on the floor between your feet.
Hike it back and clean it to the rack position in one smooth arc.
From the rack, press overhead to full extension.
Lower back to rack, then back to the floor and repeat.
